scripts.dev:headless: npm run prep:brand && xvfb-run -a --server-args='-screen 0 1280x720x24' tauri dev
scripts.build:all: npm run prep:brand && node scripts/tauri-build.cjs && node scripts/rename-artifacts.cjs
scripts.build:windows: npm run prep:brand && node scripts/tauri-build.cjs --bundles nsis && node scripts/rename-artifacts.cjs
scripts.build:windows-gnu: npm run prep:brand && node scripts/tauri-build.cjs --target x86_64-pc-windows-gnu --no-bundle
scripts.build:linux: npm run prep:brand && node scripts/tauri-build.cjs --bundles deb && node scripts/rename-artifacts.cjs
scripts.build:linux-ci: npm run prep:brand && node scripts/tauri-build.cjs --bundles deb,appimage && node scripts/rename-artifacts.cjs
scripts.icons:tauri: npm run prep:brand && npx tauri icon build/icon.png
